{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Witch of Kaseri
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Witch of Kaseri]] is a manipulator of the Void and an accomplished practitioner of her world's energy system.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Witch of Kaseri]] attempted to subvert the [[Mad King's fragment]] using chaotic authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
